ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jurisdictions" (
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jurisdiction */,
  "jurisdiction_name" TEXT /* Name of the jurisdiction */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the jurisdiction is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the jurisdiction is located */,
  "legal_system" TEXT /* Type of legal system (e.g., common law, civil law) */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body overseeing legal education and licensing */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the regulatory body */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the regulatory body's website */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the jurisdiction's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "law_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each law program */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jurisdiction where the program is offered */,
  "duration_in_years" TEXT /* Duration of the law program in years */,
  "curriculum_different" TEXT /* Whether the curriculum is different from LL.B. in the jurisdiction */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the law program */,
  "institute_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational institution offering the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., LL.B., J.D.) */,
  "additional_requirements" TEXT /* Any additional requirements for the program */,
  "tuition_fee" TEXT /* Tuition fee for the program */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Admission requirements for the program */,
  "language_of_instruction" TEXT /* Language in which the program is taught */,
  "program_website" TEXT /* URL of the program's website */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the program information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_law_programs_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licensing_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each licensing requirement */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jurisdiction where the requirement applies */,
  "further_training_required" TEXT /* Whether further training is required for licensure */,
  "licensing_body" TEXT /* Name of the body issuing the license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "exam_requirements" TEXT /* Details of the exams required for licensure */,
  "application_process" TEXT /* Description of the application process */,
  "fees" TEXT /* Fees associated with the licensing process */,
  "renewal_process" TEXT /* Description of the license renewal process */,
  "renewal_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of license renewal */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the licensing body */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the licensing body's website */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the licensing requirements were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licensing_requirements_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scholarly_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scholarly content */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the law program where the content is required */,
  "absent" TEXT /* Whether the scholarly content is absent */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the scholarly content */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the content */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the content (e.g., journal, book) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL where the content can be accessed */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract or summary of the content */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the content information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scholarly_content_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES law_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., lawyer, law student, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the law program being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the program */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the program was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the program */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES law_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the law program being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the program */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the person who made the changes */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who reviewed the changes */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were reviewed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES law_programs ("program_id")
)
